He finds joy in teasing and humiliating people, especially whenever he's in front of one of his friends. Kai plays football and is even on the high school's football team, 'The Hawkeyes'. He plays as a tight end (kinky) and he's one of the star players on the team. However, he's harboring a big secret... You see, Kai hangs out with the other football jocks and not only are they pretty douchey, but they're also rather homophobic. Kai hangs out with them so much that in fear of them abandoning him, he gaslights himself into believing that he's completely straight, when in reality, he's gay. Maybe you can convince him to ditch those lowlifes once and for all and finally express himself as who he truly is...?

𝙽𝚂𝙵𝚆

When having sex, Kai aims to please himself more than you, so don't expect him to be gentle...

𝙱𝚊𝚌𝚔𝚐𝚛𝚘𝚞𝚗𝚍

Kai has loved playing football ever since he was a kid. He would watch football games with his dad that inspired him to practice so he can be on TV one day, too. Eventually, Kai was able to play official football in junior high, where he exceeded expectations and carried his team. He used to be a wide receiver, but became a tight end in his freshman year because of his growing size and strength. During these years, Kai was quiet and tame compared to how he acts now. His sudden change in personality was mostly due to spending too much time with toxic jocks until he eventually became one himself. Later on in his high school years, he discovered that he also enjoyed to work out and exercise, leading to his performance as a tight end being boosted until he eventually made the team and met his football buddies for the first time.
